src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind imports with jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Java EE to Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Refactor the converter method to accept data via Camel Exchange properties instead of relying on Spring @Value configuration, aligning with Camel 3/Spring Boot 3 integration patterns.
Consolidate individual model imports into wildcard imports and remove unused utility imports to clean up the file header.
Correct variable naming inconsistency by renaming 'airportIataName' to 'airportIATAName' to match the source object name.
Update stop assignment logic to conditionally replace the Quay reference with data from the injected NSR Quay map if available.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to utilize Java 10+ local variable type inference.
Adjust method call formatting and remove trailing whitespace/newlines for cleaner code structure.
Migrate JAXB import from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Replace Collectors.toList() with the more concise Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() and integrate sorting directly into the stream pipeline for cleaner code.
Remove redundant explicit sorting of a list that is now sorted during creation via the stream pipeline.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
Inline local variables in createQuayId method to simplify code structure.
Replace the deprecated Collectors.toList() collector with the Stream.toList() terminal method introduced in Java 16.
Replace deprecated javax.xml.datatype.Duration with java.time.Duration to align with Java 21 standards and remove legacy XML datatype dependencies.
Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace verbose Collectors.toList() calls with the concise Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.

Replace the legacy Collectors.toList() collector with the concise Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
